danger_signals.visual_form: Enemy robot models with distinct silhouettes and movement patterns
danger_signals.meaning: Active threat requiring evasion or destruction; infected robots attempt to destroy player ship

danger_signals.visual_form: Reactor entity in level, countdown timer after activation
danger_signals.meaning: Level self-destruct imminent after reactor destruction; time pressure increases danger

danger_signals.visual_form: Larger, distinctly designed robot entity replacing reactor on every fourth level
danger_signals.meaning: Escalated threat level; boss encounters mark level progression checkpoints

danger_signals.visual_form: Unlit passages and caverns; areas without active lighting
danger_signals.meaning: Navigation hazard; disorientation risk; player must use flares or headlight to navigate safely

danger_signals.visual_form: Generator entities spawning continuous robot waves
danger_signals.meaning: Persistent threat source; disabling generators reduces enemy pressure

danger_signals.visual_form: Blue, yellow, or red colored door barriers
danger_signals.meaning: Access restriction; requires corresponding key item to progress; gates dangerous areas

safety_signals.visual_form: Commandable scouting robot model that can be freed and follows player
safety_signals.meaning: Navigation assistance; helps locate objectives and power-ups; reduces disorientation danger
Resource recovery points; safe zones for ship energy restoration

safety_signals.visual_form: Open exit portal appearing after reactor destruction
safety_signals.meaning: Escape route available; indicates safe passage out of level before self-destruct

safety_signals.visual_form: Wireframe map showing explored areas and markers
safety_signals.meaning: Spatial safety; knowledge of layout reduces disorientation and navigation hazards
Optional rescue objectives; indicate human-controlled areas within mines

safety_signals.visual_form: Collectible items scattered throughout mines or dropped by destroyed robots
safety_signals.meaning: Resource availability; expanded weaponry and capability increases player safety margin

faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Exit doors; human hostages; control panels

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Distinct robot model designs varying by level and system
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Different robot types by themed star system; boss variants on fourth levels
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Robot generators; robot corpses; destroyed enemy remains

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Distinctive scouting robot model with assist behavior
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Can be freed and commanded; leads to objectives

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Mine operates normally; doors may be locked; generators actively spawning robots
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Robots patrol and attack; generators produce continuous enemy waves; players navigate to reactor

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Countdown timer visible; exit door opens and becomes accessible
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Mine self-destruct sequence initiated; time pressure forces immediate escape; robots continue attacking

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Unlit passages; shadowed caverns; limited sight lines without headlight or flares
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player must use flares to navigate; disorientation increases; hazard avoidance becomes difficult

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Hidden teleporter behind secret door; access to alternate level space
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player cannot save in secret levels; must teleport back to regular level to save progress

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Six differently themed mine environments; unique visual aesthetics per system
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Different robot types per system; varying level layouts and difficulty progression

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Boss robot replaces standard reactor; larger, distinct visual design
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Boss combat encounter replaces reactor destruction objective; escalated threat intensity

environmental_storytelling.example: Six distinct star systems with unique visual aesthetics communicate different underground environments and mining operations
Presence of human NPCs indicates human-controlled areas and mining colony presence within mines
Room-based level design with locked doors and key-gated passages communicate mine layout hierarchy and access restrictions

environmental_storytelling.visual_communication: Robot generators positioned throughout mines visually indicate threat production sources and strategic objective points

environmental_storytelling.example: Shootable control panels that trigger doors, wall removal, and force field deactivation communicate environmental manipulation systems
Central reactor objective with self-destruct mechanic creates narrative urgency and visual focal point for level progression

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Attempt to destroy player ship; engage in combat; movement patterns vary by robot type
Continuously spawn robot waves; persist until destroyed or disabled
Leads player to specified objectives; guides to power-ups; provides navigation assistance
Stationary objective; upon destruction triggers countdown timer and self-destruct sequence
Replaces reactor on fourth levels; represents escalated threat requiring defeat to progress
Allow ship energy regeneration upon contact; function as safe resource zones

notes: Descent II uses environmental design and entity behavior to communicate danger through robot presence, mine self-destruct mechanics, and darkness as navigation hazard. Safety is signaled through guide-bots, energy stations, and automap systems. Faction identity is communicated primarily through robot distinct designs per star system rather than color coding. World-state changes are manifested through visible countdown timers, exit door appearance, and generator activity. The game does not appear to feature political faction systems or complex political scenarios in available source material.
